summary: A clip from a Fox News interview. A woman in a dark top is interviewed at a desk on the left, labeled in the lower-third as Jennifer Bos, Mother of Megan Bos, and later Angel Mom. The right side of the screen shows photographs of a young woman, including a portrait and a snapshot of her holding a small child. The banner reads NOW: ANGEL MOM ON LOSS OF DAUGHTER TO ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CRIME.

script.scene: A woman is interviewed at a desk; a portrait of a young woman is shown on the right; lower-third names the interviewee.
A snapshot of the young woman holding a small child appears beside the interviewee.
Another photo of the young woman by water at sunset appears; banner reads ANGEL MOM ON LOSS OF DAUGHTER TO ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CRIME.

notable_text: Mother of Megan Bos; ANGEL MOM; NOW: ANGEL MOM ON LOSS OF DAUGHTER TO ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CRIME
